entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume crop Cicer arietinum L. being studied for drought tolerance

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT
entities.description: A major constraint to chickpea productivity occurring at the end of the growing season

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of chickpea genotypes to maintain productivity under drought stress

entities.name: MINICORE GERMPLASM
entities.description: A collection of 211 chickpea accessions used for evaluation

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE INDEX
entities.description: A calculated index based on standard residuals used to measure drought tolerance per se

entities.name: REGRESSION APPROACH
entities.description: The statistical method used to calculate the drought tolerance index

entities.name: DROUGHT YIELD
entities.description: The yield of the crop measured under drought conditions

entities.name: DAYS TO FLOWERING
entities.description: The time from sowing to the onset of flowering

entities.name: YIELD POTENTIAL
entities.description: The maximum yield achievable under optimal conditions

entities.name: SOUTH-INDIA
entities.description: The geographic region where the short season environment evaluation took place

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: The number of days until 50% of the plants have flowered

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The time taken for the crop to reach full maturity

entities.name: SHOOT BIOMASS
entities.description: The total weight of the shoot system of the plant

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The weight of seeds produced per unit area

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: The proportion of phenotypic variation attributable to genetic factors

entities.name: OPTIMALLY IRRIGATED ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: The control environment used to compare heritability and yield

entities.name: CLUSTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: The statistical method used to categorize accessions into tolerance groups based on DTI

entities.name: ICC 4958
entities.description: A previously identified drought tolerant chickpea genotype
